content.title: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
content.summary: The Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate is a beginner-oriented program for entry-level cybersecurity work. It combines foundations, hands-on tools, incident response concepts, and professional preparation across eight courses.

credential_details.focus: foundational analyst skills, hands-on labs, and early-career readiness

knowledge_areas: Foundations of cybersecurity: field overview, roles, ethics, CISSP domains, the CIA triad, and common controls.
Security risk management: threats, vulnerabilities, risk treatment, frameworks, controls, and audits.
Network security: network architectures, TCP/IP, common protocols, intrusion tactics, firewalls, VPNs, and hardening.
Linux and SQL: command-line work, permissions, file systems, queries, joins, and filters.
Assets, threats, and vulnerabilities: asset classification, encryption and hashing, authentication, authorization, and attack-surface thinking.
Detection and response: incident lifecycle, packet analysis, artifacts, logs, IDS, and SIEM workflows.
Python automation: variables, loops, conditionals, functions, regex, file I/O, and debugging for security tasks.
Job preparation: escalation, stakeholder communication, ethics, AI in workflows, and professional readiness.
learning_outcomes: Build a solid baseline in security principles, risk management, and incident response.
Work with common analyst-oriented tools and environments, including Linux, SQL, SIEM, IDS, and Python.
Understand how networks, assets, vulnerabilities, and detection workflows connect in practical security work.
Strengthen communication and escalation habits for entry-level cybersecurity roles.
tools_and_frameworks: Tools and platforms: Python, Linux, SQL, SIEM, IDS.
Core frameworks and concepts: CIA triad, NIST CSF, incident response lifecycle, threat modeling, CVEs, and MITRE-style taxonomy.
Typical artifacts: risk assessments, packet captures, SIEM queries, logs, SQL queries, Linux scripts, and Python automation scripts.

proof.label: Credly badge: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
